titleStmt.title: SII 8.462: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 462. (A.R. No. 165-B of 1903). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pra sāda mceytaruḷivanta tirumukappaṭikku tiripuvanacakra vatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ kuṭanāṭṭu
koṟkaiyāṉa maturotaiyanallūr Akkacālaiīśva ramuṭaiyār koyil tāṉattāṟkuk kiḻvempanāṭṭu I
rācavallapurattuk kaṇmāḷaril kariyāṉ nācakaṉāṉa virapāṇṭiyaācāriyaṉ nam perāl Ittevaṟkuk kaṭṭiṉa vi
rapāṇṭiyaṉ cantikkum paṅkūṉittirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷuvittu nām piṟanta catayattu nāḷ tirttampra sādi kkavu
m Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nittanimantaṅkaḷukku Ittevar tirumaṭaiviḷākattu nāṉkellai
t tiruccūlakkalluk kuḷpaṭṭa nilattukku kaṭamai ntarāyamum viṉiyokamun taruvatāṉa Accum veṭṭipāṭ
ṭamum pañcupili cantivikkirakappeṟu muta yum vācaṟpeṟum Ilāñciṉaippeṟum taṟiyiṟai cek- 8—9 completely damaged
tavirntu Ittevar paḻantevatāṉañ colaimaṅkala
māṉa puravariviḷākatti ñ ceytavarkaḷ Uḻutupon mum Añcāvatu mutal Ivvirapāṇṭiyavācāriya
ṉ nam perāl kaṭṭiṉa virapāṇṭiyaṉcantikkum paṅkūṉittirunā n taruḷuvittu nām piṟanta catayattu nāḷ tirttam pra sādi
kkavum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi ṭṭu veṇṭum nittal nimantaṅkaḷuk Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu kāliṅkarāyar namakkuc
coṉṉamaiyil It viḷākattu nāṉkellait tiruccūlakkalluk kuṭpaṭṭa nilattukkuk kaṭamaiyum An
tarāyamum m pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum vācal
lā taṟi pāṭṭamum tāṉappeṟum
paṭaiyilār vāriyappeṟum kāṟte� ttevaiyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭiṉavun tavirntu te tevatāṉam
colaimaṅkalamāṉa puravariviḷākattu namkāriyam ceytu pontavarkaḷ Uḻutuponta nilamum Ivvirapāṇṭiyaācāriyaṉ nam
perāl kaṭṭiṉa virapāṇṭiyaṉcantikkup paṅkuṉit tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷuvittu nām piṟanta cataiyattunāḷ tit[ tam pra] sādi kkavum Amu
tupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nittalnimantaṅkaḷukku nām Aiñcāvatu mutal tantom . Ippaṭi can=tādi ttavaṟ celvatākak
kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka . Ivai paḻantiparāyaṉ Eḻuttu . yāṇṭu 5vatu nāḷ 4 10 8 . Ivai teṉṉavatarayaṉ
Eḻuttu . Ivai pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 8.462 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
